title: OceTags
description: OceTags is OceNet's tiertagger, with built-in MCTiers Support. See player's tiers directly in-game, including in nametags, the tab list, and chat.
body:
![Tier show in nametags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c65d3c3cdb7be314f57e04b2ce2fe96485a5f58_0.webp)OceTags is the client-side mod that integrates the OceNet and MCTiers rankings directly into Minecraft, allowing you to see player tiers without leaving the game.

The mod displays player tiers in multiple in-game locations, including nametags, the tab list, and chat, making it easy to quickly understand a player’s tiers during gameplay. This removes the need to manually check external leaderboards and keeps all relevant information accessible while you play.

OceTags supports viewing tiers in two ways:
- Per gamemode tiers, for players focusing on a particular gamemode.
- Overall leaderboard placement, for a broader view of a player’s ranking.

Important Information
- This mod is affiliated with and endorsed by 1.9+ Oceania PvP Community (OceNet)
- It does not provide gameplay advantages or modify mechanics, it is purely informational  
- An internet connection may be required to fetch up-to-date player data.

If you regularly use OceNet and/or MCTiers (or just want to flex your tier in a screenshot), OceTags offers a simple way to keep track of rankings directly in-game without interrupting your experience.

# DM "Typoplays" on discord if you encounter any problems
# REQUIRES [UKULIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)
